title: cheilanthes odora
intro: Cheilanthes odora, also known as fragrant fern, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cheilanthes odora include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Cheilanthes odora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
